    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Board
    Class generating and holding the playing board.
    Direction
    Enum class with directions.
    EndScreen
    Graphics of the screen that shows at the end of the game.
    Exit
    A logical class holding coordinates of an exit.
    GameEndListener
    Interface, so that the classes of different game stages can "communicate"
    GameEndReason
    Enum of reasons to end the game.
    GameScreen
    The UI of the main game.
    GameSettings
    The settings a player can choose at the initial screen.
    Hero
    Class that represents logic of a hero (one play piece).
    Logic
    Class that takes all the logic of the game into one place.
    Main
     
    SetupScreen
    Initial screen, where controls can be chosen.
    Tile
    Class of logic representing a single tile on the board.
    Timer
    Class to control the timer in the game.
    TimeReset
    Class holding a time-resetter
